muldiv.doc: Calculates (a * b) / c. Errors if result doesn't fit into u64.

ceil_muldiv.doc: Calculates ceil_div((a * b), c). Errors if result doesn't fit into u64.

calc_swap_out.doc: Calculates swap result and fees based on the input amount and current pool state.

fee_points.doc: Fees for liquidity provider expressed in points (30 point is 0.3%)
